meta.name: Tiptrip — Hermes Agent Editorial Print Adaptation
meta.description: A two-ink digital editorial system extracted from the Hermes Agent website and adapted for Tiptrip: saturated cobalt fields, warm paper-white panels, high-contrast classical display typography, monospaced annotations, engraved halftone imagery, radial rules, and restrained hand-drawn interaction traces.
source_references: Tiptrip current promotional copy and Android product interface

primary.role: dominant cobalt field, line art, headings, borders, and interactive emphasis

secondary.role: paper-white foreground, editorial panels, type, and inverted controls

accent.role: Tiptrip-only semantic accent for food markers; used sparingly outside the extracted two-ink system

neutral.usage: Reference is intentionally almost neutral-free: paper white and cobalt replace conventional gray hierarchy; opacity supplies secondary levels.

color.contrast_strategy: Hard two-tone inversion: white on cobalt for immersive stages and cobalt on paper for information-dense panels.

typography.font_style_notes: A high-contrast Didone/editorial serif carries monumental headlines, while dense uppercase monospaced text evokes technical captions and printed research notes.

spacing.content_density: spacious hero and footer; dense magazine grids
spacing.section_rhythm: Immersive cobalt stages alternate with white editorial sheets; vertical rhythm jumps between 120–180px section openings and compact 20–32px card internals.

layout.grid_system: Centered editorial canvas with three-column feature sheets and large asymmetric hero collage
layout.columns: 5-part navigation, 12-column hero, 3-column feature grid; single-column mobile
layout.alignment_tendency: mixed: formal centered navigation and footer, asymmetric hero, strict feature sheet

shape.border_usage: Square-cornered panels with thin cobalt rules; rounded geometry is avoided except circular artwork and interaction traces.
shape.divider_style: 1px solid currentColor with editorial crop marks and occasional double rules

elevation.depth_cues: Color inversion, poster layering, oversized cropped type, hard offset shadows, and transparent ink overlays

iconography.style: engraved line art, tiny platform glyphs, arrows, and hand-drawn arcs
iconography.preferred_set: custom inline SVG and CSS-drawn editorial marks

motion.entrance_pattern: ink-wipe clip reveal, line draw, and stepped poster assembly
motion.exit_pattern: fast opacity reduction or clipped vertical departure
motion.philosophy: Editorial and tactile: mostly static print composition with selective hand-drawn and scroll-reveal moments.

components.button_style: Paper-white rectangular button on cobalt, blue serif/mono label, hard shadow, leading pictogram, no radius.
components.input_style: White command-strip panel with blue monospace copy, tab underline, square edges, and copy affordance.
components.card_style: White printed sheet with blue text, etched/halftone image block, overline index, large serif heading, and concise monospaced body.
components.navigation_pattern: Unboxed five-part horizontal navigation with centered two-line wordmark and small uppercase serif links.
components.modal_style: Full-screen cobalt editorial plate with white rule frame.
components.list_style: Numbered research-note sequence in a three-column paper grid.
components.component_notes: Tiptrip maps become two-ink technical diagrams; attractions stay cobalt and food retains a controlled coral-red exception.

aesthetic.visual_metaphor: An open-source research manifesto printed as a limited-run cobalt risograph poster.
aesthetic.era_influence: Neoclassical engraving, 1970s speculative-technology publishing, early desktop terminals, and contemporary web brutalism.

visual_language.whitespace_usage: large unoccupied cobalt fields around monumental focal art; tight white feature sheets
visual_language.visual_weight_distribution: large serif type competes deliberately with a single etched illustration or interface plate
visual_language.focal_strategy: single collage hero followed by rhythmic printed modules
visual_language.texture_usage: heavy halftone, scanline, engraving hatch, paper grain, and low-opacity ink overprint

composition.hierarchy_method: serif scale contrast, two-tone inversion, numbered overlines, and oversized word crops
composition.flow_direction: top-to-bottom manifesto with alternating immersive and printed-sheet chapters
composition.grouping_strategy: three-column feature issues, centered call-to-action plates, and layered poster art
composition.negative_space_role: Acts as the blue ink field that gives engraved details and white type room to feel ceremonial.

imagery.photo_treatment: strict cobalt-and-white duotone with high threshold, halftone dots, scanlines, and clipped rectangular crops
imagery.illustration_style: classical engraving and manga-like monochrome linework recolored as cobalt ink
imagery.graphic_elements: radial sunbursts, orbital circles, crop marks, giant serif fragments, hand-drawn arcs, terminal strips
imagery.pattern_usage: halftone fields, horizontal scanlines, radiating rules, and sparse paper grain
imagery.image_shape: square editorial plates, full-bleed poster collage, and circular orbital focal points

interaction_feel.feedback_style: ink inversion, underline appearance, hand-drawn arc trace, and instant opacity change
interaction_feel.hover_behavior: underlines and irregular line marks appear; white buttons brighten without rounding or lift
interaction_feel.transition_personality: snappy print registration with occasional slow hand-drawn flourish
interaction_feel.loading_style: poster layers and etched linework assemble in sequence
interaction_feel.microinteraction_density: moderate and focused on links, download controls, tabs, and cursor traces

brand_voice_in_ui.cta_style: direct imperative framed as a printed label
brand_voice_in_ui.empty_state_approach: terminal-like instruction on an otherwise clean paper panel
brand_voice_in_ui.error_tone: concise diagnostic note with a clear recovery command

overview.fallback_strategy: Disable pointer canvas, animated ink grain, video, and parallax; preserve static duotone poster composition.
overview.primary_technology: CSS, Canvas 2D, SVG, and HTML video

background_effects.description: Cobalt fields carry subtle analog paper/ink noise rather than gradients, reinforcing a screen-printed surface.
background_effects.technology: CSS noise texture and optional Canvas speckle

particle_systems.description: No atmospheric particle cloud; marks are authored as print texture and pointer strokes.

3d_elements.description: Visual depth is collage-based rather than true 3D.

shader_effects.description: No confirmed WebGL shader; duotone and halftone are image/CSS treatments.

scroll_triggered_animations.scrub_behavior: mostly triggered; large word crops use light scrub

scroll_morphing.description: Chapters cut between composed editorial plates instead of morphing continuously.

text_effects.description: Display-serif lines reveal through vertical masks; giant words are intentionally cropped at viewport edges.

cursor_effects.description: A fixed full-viewport Canvas draws brief irregular hand-mark traces near interactive regions.

image_effects.description: Duotone image plates reveal as sharp rectangular crops with scanline or halftone overlay.
image_effects.technology: CSS filters, repeating gradients, and clip-path

params.hover_transform: subtle 1.02 scale and ink density change

canvas_drawings.description: A fixed transparent canvas renders temporary pointer handwriting and registration marks.

params.color_scheme: paper white on cobalt / cobalt on paper
params.interaction: pointer trail on fine pointers; disabled for touch and reduced motion

svg_animations.description: Hand-drawn arcs, radial route rays, and map paths animate through stroke-dashoffset.

visual_effects.composite_notes: Observed source effects include a fixed full-viewport Canvas, repeating hand-drawn arc animations around controls, a non-autoplay desktop showcase video, an autoplay looping portal artwork video, duotone etched imagery, and strong paper/cobalt color inversion. The Tiptrip adaptation implements original route engraving, scanline UI plates, and pointer ink traces without copying the source's figurative artwork.
